filters.note: All walkers listed meet the minimum rating (>4.8) and review count (>50) criteria. Price is confirmed under $60 where available; marked as 'Contact for pricing' when not publicly listed (area median is ~$25/walk, so likely well under $60).

walkers.name: Aubrey M.
walkers.highlight: 30 years of experience. 23 repeat clients. "Aubrey has been great with our shy and sensitive dog." Most-reviewed walker in the San Ramon area on Rover.

walkers.name: Happy Tails Pet Care
walkers.highlight: Serving the valley since 2006. Yelp Neighborhood Fave award winner every year since 2020. Licensed, bonded, insured. Red Cross pet first aid & CPR certified. Owner: Colleen.

walkers.name: Fetch! Pet Care of East Bay & Contra Costa
walkers.highlight: National franchise with local ownership. All caregivers are bonded, insured, and background checked. Excellent last-minute availability. Flexible scheduling.

walkers.name: Mucho Poocho
walkers.location: Dublin, CA (serves Dublin, Pleasanton & San Ramon)
walkers.highlight: Owner Hope Maselli, in business since 2011. Licensed, insured through Pet Sitters LLC, pet CPR certified. Offers unique pack walking option with up to 8 dogs. Dogs and clients love her — multiple 2+ year client relationships.

walkers.name: Naughty to Nice Dog Training
walkers.highlight: 5-star rating on both Google and Yelp. Certified Veterinary Technician owner (Nikolett). Offers dog walking alongside professional training — unique combo of exercise + behavior reinforcement.
